name: signoz
description: Official SigNoz plugin for MCP setup, docs, queries, dashboards, and alerts

SIGNOZ_REGION.title: SigNoz Region
SIGNOZ_REGION.description: SigNoz Cloud: select your region code (shown under **Settings -> Ingestion**; see the [region reference](https://signoz.io/docs/ingestion/signoz-cloud/keys/)) and Cursor will connect to `https://mcp.<region>.signoz.cloud/mcp` and start the OAuth login. Self-hosted SigNoz: choose **self-hosted** — this skips the Cloud OAuth and leaves the MCP endpoint unconfigured. After install, you MUST run `/signoz-mcp-setup` in an Agent chat with your own HTTP `/mcp` URL (for example `/signoz-mcp-setup http://localhost:8000/mcp`) to point it at your instance.
